channel.title: SME India on Ventryx – Visitor & Attendance Management Software India
channel.description: Recent content in SME India on Ventryx – Visitor & Attendance Management Software India

item.title: Manual vs Digital Attendance Tracking: The Real Cost for Indian SMEs
item.description: Walk into a mid-sized manufacturing unit in Pune or a growing IT services firm in Hyderabad, and you will likely find one of two scenes: a dog-eared register sitting near the front desk with ink smudges from a hundred different pens, or a biometric device mounted on the wall with a small queue of employees waiting to punch in at 9:01 AM. Both of these are attempts to solve the same problem - knowing who showed up, when, and for how long.
